name: @tokelang-lite/claude-code-skill
description: NPX installer for the Tokelang Claude Code plugin: downloads the matching engine binary and installs the plugin (skills + agents + hooks + statusline) as a personal skills-directory plugin. Compresses subagent prompts + WebFetch/Search tool results + output verbosity locally, with an optional cost router. Apache 2.0.
author: Tokelang
